---
title: "-Science Beneath the Surface-"
number-sections: false
crossref:
  chapters: false
lang: en
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ja" href="https://deepflows.net/blog" />
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://deepflows.net/blog-en" />
listing:
  - id: groundwater-series
    contents:
      - "posts/groundwater/**/index-en.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date asc"
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
  - id: phreeqc-series
    contents:
      - "posts/phreeqc/**/index-en.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort: "date asc"
    categories: false
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="blog-intro">

  <div class="intro-lead">
    <div class="intro-lead-line"></div>
    <p class="intro-lead-text">Water moves, even deep beneath the surface.</p>
  </div>

  <p class="intro-body">
    Where does the rain go after it seeps underground? How do fresh water and seawater mix beneath the coast? When and how are nitrates decomposed? This blog aims to reproduce these "invisible movements of water" inside a computer.
  </p>

  <div class="tools-grid">
    <div class="tool-card">
      <div class="tool-icon">⬛</div>
      <div class="tool-content">
        <div class="tool-name">MODFLOW / SEAWAT</div>
        <div class="tool-desc">The industry-standard simulator for solving groundwater flow numerically. It calculates flow based on Darcy's law, density-driven convection, and even tidal effects. Essential for analyzing the Ghyben-Herzberg interface and SGD in coastal areas.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="tool-card">
      <div class="tool-icon">⚗️</div>
      <div class="tool-content">
        <div class="tool-name">PHREEQC</div>
        <div class="tool-desc">The engine for geochemical calculations. It solves the "chemistry of water" at the level of reaction equations—chemical reactions between water and rock, saturation indices of mixed waters, and the progression of denitrification.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="tool-card">
      <div class="tool-icon">🐍</div>
      <div class="tool-content">
        <div class="tool-name">Python（FloPy・PhreeqPy）</div>
        <div class="tool-desc">The glue that connects the two. Fully automates everything from grid generation and boundary condition setup to result visualization. Change one line of parameter, and another scenario runs instantly.</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="themes-block">
    <div class="themes-label">Themes</div>
    <div class="themes-list">
      <div class="theme-item">Formation of the freshwater-seawater interface in the Ryukyu limestone aquifer</div>
      <div class="theme-item">Rock-water interaction analysis (under varying conditions of solution concentration, temperature, etc.)</div>
      <div class="theme-item">Groundwater nitrate contamination and denitrification diagnosis</div>
      <div class="theme-item">Limestone dissolution potential analysis by mixing corrosion</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <p class="intro-footer">
    This blog is not a place to present completed research results, but a <strong>record of trial and error</strong>. The story of when the code didn't work, the hesitation in deciding parameters, the process of struggling with corrections using Vibe Coding—I will write down these "processes" as much as possible.
  </p>

</div>

<style>
.blog-intro {
  max-width: 720px;
  margin: 0 0 2.5rem 0;
  font-family: inherit;
}

/* リード文 */
.intro-lead {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
}
.intro-lead-line {
  width: 3px;
  height: 28px;
  background: #C96A28;
  border-radius: 2px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.intro-lead-text {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1A1A1A;
  letter-spacing: -0.01em;
  margin: 0;
}

/* 本文 */
.intro-body {
  font-size: 0.93rem;
  line-height: 1.85;
  color: #3a3a3a;
  margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
}

/* ツールカード */
.tools-grid {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 1.6rem;
}
.tool-card {
  display: flex;
  gap: 14px;
  align-items: flex-start;
  background: #FDFAF6;
  border: 1px solid #E8E4DC;
  border-left: 3px solid #E07B39;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 14px 16px;
}
.tool-icon {
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 1;
  margin-top: 1px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}
.tool-name {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1A1A1A;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
  font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Consolas', monospace;
  letter-spacing: 0.01em;
}
.tool-desc {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  line-height: 1.7;
  color: #5a5a5a;
}

/* テーマ */
.themes-block {
  background: #F7F5F0;
  border: 1px solid #E8E4DC;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 14px 18px;
  margin-bottom: 1.4rem;
}
.themes-label {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #7A746A;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}
.themes-list {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
}
.theme-item {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: #3a3a3a;
  padding-left: 14px;
  position: relative;
  line-height: 1.6;
}
.theme-item::before {
  content: '—';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  color: #C96A28;
  font-weight: 700;
}

/* フッター文 */
.intro-footer {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  line-height: 1.8;
  color: #5a5a5a;
  border-top: 1px solid #E8E4DC;
  padding-top: 1rem;
}
.intro-footer strong {
  color: #1A1A1A;
}

/* 言語バッジ */
.badge-ja {
  font-size: 0.75em;
  background-color: #FFF7ED;
  color: #D97706;
  padding: 2px 6px;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-weight: bold;
  border: 1px solid #FDBA74;
  margin-left: 6px;
  vertical-align: middle;
}

/* Series Section Headers */
.series-section-header {
  text-align: center;
  margin: 4rem 0 2rem;
  padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
  border-bottom: 2px dashed #E8E4DC;
}
.series-heading {
  font-size: 2.2rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1A1A1A;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  gap: 16px;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
  margin-bottom: 0.8rem;
}
.series-icon {
  font-size: 2.5rem;
}
.series-subheading {
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: #6B7280;
  font-weight: 500;
  margin: 0;
}

/* Card Design and Hover effects */
.quarto-grid-item.card {
  transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.25, 0.8, 0.25, 1);
  box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.05);
  border: 1px solid rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.4) !important;
  background-color: #FFFAF0 !important;
}
.quarto-grid-item.card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-8px);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 20px rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.2);
  border-color: rgba(217, 119, 6, 0.8) !important;
}
</style>
```

:::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12}
```{=html}
<div class="series-section-header">
  <div class="series-heading">
    <span class="series-icon">🌊</span>
    <span>Groundwater Series</span>
  </div>
  <p class="series-subheading">Practical know-how for analyzing groundwater flow with MODFLOW and FloPy.</p>
</div>
```

:::{#groundwater-series}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12}
```{=html}
<div class="series-section-header">
  <div class="series-heading">
    <span class="series-icon">⚗️</span>
    <span>Geochemistry Series</span>
  </div>
  <p class="series-subheading">Modeling water quality and geochemical reactions using PHREEQC and Python.</p>
</div>
```

:::{#phreeqc-series}
:::
:::


::::
